system.description: The character projects their magical power in an awe-inspiring manner. When making a reaction throw to impress or intimidate other people, the character throws with Advantage. On a natural roll of 12, the target is so impressed that they act as though they were enthralled (per the Enthrall spell) when in the sorcerer's presence.
system.shortdescr: Advantage on reaction to impress or intimidate.
